_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Better Than Wolves CE
author: phantomic12
description:
Better Than Wolves Community Edition server. Minecraft 1.6.4 with Legacy Fabric loader and the official BTWCE mod from Modrinth.
Wiki: https://wiki.btwce.com/view/3.0.0_Beta
Mod: https://modrinth.com/mod/btwce

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Better Than Wolves CE - Pterodactyl Egg Installation Script
# Minecraft 1.6.4 + Legacy Fabric 0.15.11 + BTWCE 3.x
# Server Files: /mnt/server
#
# This installs start.sh which is what the egg's startup command runs.
# The start.sh is self-bootstrapping: if it runs before files are installed,
# it will run the install itself. This makes 'Start Server' work even if
# the user never clicked 'Reinstall Server'.

set -e

apt-get update
apt-get install -y curl jq unzip wget dos2unix

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

# Write start.sh (the actual entrypoint). Self-bootstraps on first run.
cat > /mnt/server/start.sh <<'START'
#!/bin/bash
# BTWCE self-bootstrapping startup script.
# If fabric-server-launch.jar is missing, run the install first.
# Otherwise, just exec the server.

set -e
cd /mnt/server

# Ensure basic tools are present (no-op if already installed).
if ! command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1 || ! command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  apt-get update
  apt-get install -y curl jq unzip wget dos2unix
fi

MC_VERSION="${MC_VERSION:-1.6.4}"
BTWCE_VERSION="${BTWCE_VERSION:-3.1.0}"

install_btwce() {
  echo "[install] BTWCE files not found - running first-time install..."

  if [ ! -f lf-installer.jar ]; then
    echo "[install] [1/3] Downloading Legacy Fabric installer..."
    curl -sSL --fail -o lf-installer.jar \
      "https://maven.legacyfabric.net/net/legacyfabric/fabric-installer/0.11.1/fabric-installer-0.11.1.jar" \
      || { echo "[install] ERROR: could not download LF installer"; exit 1; }
  fi

  echo "[install] [2/3] Running Legacy Fabric installer (MC ${MC_VERSION}, loader 0.15.11)..."
  java -jar lf-installer.jar server -dir . -mcversion "${MC_VERSION}" -loader 0.15.11 -downloadMinecraft \
    || { echo "[install] ERROR: LF installer failed (maven.legacyfabric.net may be flaky - retry)"; exit 1; }

  if [ ! -f fabric-server-launch.jar ]; then
    echo "[install] ERROR: fabric-server-launch.jar was not produced."
    echo "[install] Retry by restarting the server in a few minutes."
    ls -la 2>/dev/null || true
    exit 1
  fi

  mkdir -p mods
  if ! ls mods/btwce-*.jar 1>/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "[install] [3/3] Downloading BTWCE ${BTWCE_VERSION} from Modrinth..."
    if [ "${BTWCE_VERSION}" = "latest" ]; then
      BTW_URL=$(curl -sSL --fail "https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/btwce/version" \
        | jq -r '[.[] | select(.version_type == "release")][0].files[0].url' | head -1)
    else
      BTW_URL=$(curl -sSL --fail "https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/btwce/version" \
        | jq -r --arg v "${BTWCE_VERSION}" '.[] | select(.version_number == $v) | .files[0].url' | head -1)
      if [ -z "$BTW_URL" ] || [ "$BTW_URL" = "null" ]; then
        echo "[install] WARN: BTWCE '${BTWCE_VERSION}' not on Modrinth, falling back to latest release."
        BTW_URL=$(curl -sSL --fail "https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/btwce/version" \
          | jq -r '[.[] | select(.version_type == "release")][0].files[0].url' | head -1)
      fi
    fi
    if [ -z "$BTW_URL" ] || [ "$BTW_URL" = "null" ]; then
      echo "[install] ERROR: could not find BTWCE on Modrinth"; exit 1
    fi
    curl -sSL --fail -o mods/btwce-mod.jar "$BTW_URL" \
      || { echo "[install] ERROR: BTWCE download failed"; exit 1; }
    echo "[install]   -> ${BTW_URL}"
  fi

  # EULA + minimal server.properties
  echo "eula=true" > eula.txt
  if [ ! -f server.properties ]; then
    cat > server.properties <<'SPROPS'
#Minecraft server properties
level-name=world
server-port=25565
level-seed=
gamemode=survival
max-players=20
motd=BTW CE Server
spawn-protection=16
online-mode=true
white-list=false
level-type=default
difficulty=2
allow-nether=true
spawn-monsters=true
spawn-animals=true
view-distance=10
tick-time=60000
SPROPS
    dos2unix server.properties 2>/dev/null || true
  fi

  rm -f lf-installer.jar
  echo "[install] BTWCE install complete."
}

# Bootstrap install if needed
if [ ! -f fabric-server-launch.jar ] || ! ls mods/btwce-*.jar 1>/dev/null 2>&1; then
  install_btwce
fi

echo "[start] Launching: java -Xms${JAVA_XMS}M -Xmx${JAVA_XMX}M -jar fabric-server-launch.jar"
exec java -Xms${JAVA_XMS}M -Xmx${JAVA_XMX}M -jar fabric-server-launch.jar
START

chmod +x /mnt/server/start.sh

echo ""
echo "====================================="
echo "  BTWCE egg installed."
echo "  Click 'Start' to bootstrap the server."
echo "  start.sh will install BTWCE on first run if needed."
echo "====================================="

variables.name: Minimum Heap Memory (MB)
variables.description: The minimum amount of RAM in megabytes allocated to the Java Virtual Machine.

variables.name: Maximum Heap Memory (MB)
variables.description: The maximum amount of RAM in megabytes allocated to the Java Virtual Machine.

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description: The Minecraft version to install. BTWCE 3.x requires 1.6.4.

variables.name: BTWCE Version
variables.description: The BTWCE mod version to install (from Modrinth). Use 'latest' for newest release, or pin a specific version like 3.1.0.

variables.name: MOTD
variables.description: The message shown in the server list.
variables.default_value: A Better Than Wolves CE Server

variables.name: Online Mode
variables.description: Verify players against Mojang accounts. Set to false to allow cracked/offline clients.
